subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God, thou art engaged in service to the Lord of all creation in the Husayniyyih school [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه تو رسید الحمد لله در مدرسه حسینیه بخدمت رب البریه قائمی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
